summary: Web Push Notifications testing completed for Little Eat Italy PWA. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI shows push notification toggle button and service worker is registered correctly. Push notifications are triggered on new orders/reservations (backend asyncio.create_task).
passed_tests: API: GET /api/push/vapid-key returns VAPID public key (200 OK)
API: POST /api/push/subscribe requires authentication (401 without token)
API: POST /api/push/subscribe creates push subscription with valid auth (200 OK)
API: POST /api/push/subscribe updates existing subscription (200 OK)
API: DELETE /api/push/unsubscribe requires authentication (401 without token)
API: DELETE /api/push/unsubscribe returns 404 for nonexistent subscription
API: DELETE /api/push/unsubscribe successfully removes subscription (200 OK)
API: GET /api/push/subscriptions requires authentication (401 without token)
API: GET /api/push/subscriptions returns list of active subscriptions (200 OK)
API: POST /api/push/test requires authentication (401 without token)
API: POST /api/push/test sends test notification (200 OK)
API: POST /api/shop/orders creates order and triggers push in background (200 OK)
API: POST /api/shop/reservations creates reservation and triggers push in background (200 OK)
API: Service worker accessible at /service-worker.js with push handlers (200 OK)
UI: Sound toggle button visible with data-testid='sound-toggle-button'
UI: Push toggle button visible with data-testid='push-toggle-button'
UI: Service Worker registered correctly
UI: All 4 tabs visible (BESTELLUNGEN, RESERVIERUNGEN, MENÜ, EINSTELLUNGEN)
UI: LIVE indicator visible
UI: PUSH status indicator shows when subscribed
critical_code_review_comments: VAPID keys properly configured in backend/.env
Push notifications use pywebpush library with proper VAPID authentication
Service worker handles 'push' and 'notificationclick' events correctly
Push subscriptions stored in MongoDB collection 'push_subscriptions'
Push notifications triggered asynchronously via asyncio.create_task on order/reservation creation
Frontend usePushNotifications hook properly converts VAPID key from base64
Added data-testid attributes to push UI elements for testability
seed_data_creation: Created test orders and reservations during push notification testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Web Push Notifications fully tested. Features verified: 1) VAPID key endpoint at /api/push/vapid-key 2) Subscribe/unsubscribe endpoints with auth 3) Test notification endpoint 4) Push triggered on orders/reservations 5) Service worker with push handlers 6) Frontend toggle button and banner. VAPID keys configured in backend/.env. Push subscriptions stored in MongoDB 'push_subscriptions' collection.

push_notification_features_verified.order_trigger: POST /api/shop/orders triggers push notification in background
push_notification_features_verified.reservation_trigger: POST /api/shop/reservations triggers push notification in background
push_notification_features_verified.service_worker: Handles push events with notification display and click actions
push_notification_features_verified.frontend_toggle: Push toggle button visible in admin header
push_notification_features_verified.frontend_banner: Push banner appears after 10 seconds for unsubscribed users
